FX.title: USD/JPY Poised for 154.50 Break as Fed's Wait-and-See Bolsters USD
tldr_points: Fed's patient stance reduces near-term rate cut expectations, supporting USD.
Easing of Strait of Hormuz tensions diminishes JPY safe-haven demand.
Technical: Price above MA20 with RSI 62 confirms bullish momentum; target 154.50.
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY: Buy target 154.50. Fed wait-see + Strait calm reduce JPY demand. Price > MA20, RSI 62. Stop <151.50.
FX.comment: Bullish breakout above MA20 with Fed support and easing geopolitical risks.

STOCKS.title: Powell's Pause vs. Geopolitical Flashpoints: S&P 500's Critical Test at 5250
tldr_points: Neutral tactical bias amid conflicting macro catalysts
Breakout above 5250 required for bullish conviction
STOCKS.excerpt: Institutional S&P 500 analysis: Neutral bias as Fed pause optimism clashes with Iran escalation. Technicals range-bound awaiting catalyst.
STOCKS.comment: Neutral tactical bias as Fed dovishness offsets geopolitical risk; price confined to 5150-5250 range.

CRYPTO.title: BTC/USD Tactical Intelligence: AI & Synapse Analytics Highlight Institutional Inflection
tldr_points: Institutional adoption surge via crypto PACs and ETF filings
AI-crypto convergence with Bitdeer's Norway data center
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD upside catalysts abound but technical clarity lacking; AI & Synapse analytics flag accumulation.
CRYPTO.comment: No immediate entry; awaiting breakout above ~$72,000 for long setup.
